fixtures.data_recipe: Generate 24 nearby points with label_column populated.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Fixed label offset creates overlapping labels.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Collision-aware labels or diagnostic warning with actionable evidence.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_geometry_diagnostics.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate 8 series with this-work and reference groups.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Series styles lack color, alpha, size, z-order, and label override controls.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Explicit hierarchy controls render this-work foreground and references muted.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_mcp_normalization.py tests/test_mcp_rendering.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate categorical x labels longer than 18 characters.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Tick label crowding may be diagnosed but not automatically polished.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Readable compressed or rotated labels with diagnostics receipt.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_geometry_diagnostics.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate 2x2 panels with long axis labels and panel titles.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Rows and columns are supported, but mosaic/span and fine layout polish are absent.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Panel spacing remains readable and diagnostics catch title/axis collisions.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_mcp_batch_quality.py tests/test_manuscript_compose.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Add dark hspan or fill_between overlay plus text annotation.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Annotation text contrast is not generally evaluated outside specialized heatmap logic.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Contrast-safe annotation defaults or diagnostics warning.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_geometry_diagnostics.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate log x and log y data spanning several decades.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Axis scale exists, but tick formatting polish is limited.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Readable tick labels and diagnostics for crowding.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_bridge_renderer.py tests/test_geometry_diagnostics.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Place a callout arrow near a dense cluster.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Arrow and label placement are manual and fixed-alignment.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Callout preset chooses a less crowded offset or emits warning.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_bridge_renderer.py -q

fixtures.data_recipe: Generate several series occupying all quadrants.
fixtures.current_expected_weakness: Legend collision diagnostics exist, but semantic legend controls are limited.
fixtures.desired_polish_behavior: Legend location, order, title, and ncol can be controlled or diagnosed.
fixtures.acceptance_command: python hub_uv.py run python -m pytest tests/test_geometry_diagnostics.py tests/test_bridge_renderer.py -q

expected_failures: typed schema discoverability for complex polish objects
series visual hierarchy controls beyond marker and edge/fill styling
